name: k8bus
quote: Hey, I’m K8bus! As the founder of TurboBlocks, I’m the one tuning the engine behind our arcade experience. From building our website to planning new, high-speed minigames, I make sure everything runs at full throttle every single week. Keeping the team on track is a busy ride, but when I’m not coding, you’ll find me hanging out on the server or Discord. If you see me around in-game, don’t be a stranger—come say hi!

name: nejt12475
quote: Solving problems you didn't know you had.
